name: Venison Jerky3
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the venison into 1/2 inch wide and 1/4 inch thick strips.
2. Mix together salt, garlic powder, black pepper, Worcestershire sauce, soy sauce, and prepared mustard to make a marinade.
3. Pour the marinade over the meat and marinate overnight in the refrigerator.
4. Remove the meat from the marinade and pat dry with paper towels.
5. Place the meat in a gas oven and use the pilot flame to dry it for 4 days, or place in an electric oven preheated to 200°F until the jerky feels dry by touch.
(Note: This recipe works best if you use the leanest cut of beef available, such as Flank Steak.)
